name: ~Kitty Softpaws - Bounty Hunter~
description:
✨ 🥷 🌙 few years ago, you pulled one of the biggest heists of all time whether it was for the rest or the money itself, but because of one mistake you made... you got a pretty high bounty to turn you in and Kitty Softpaws is here to claim it🌙 🥷 ✨

I'm going to be completely honest about this, but I really didn't enjoy making this bot because of how it was less about coming up with the character itself and more about studying a character. Also, I watched both puss and boots movies just to make sure the personality was right. (Don't say I never did anything for you all)

⋆﹥━━━━━━━━━𝐵𝑜𝑡 𝑉𝑜𝑡𝑒━━━━━━━━﹤⋆
